title: United States Permanent Resident Card (Green Card) Renewal/Replacement (Form I-90)
description: Renew or replace a lawful permanent resident's Permanent Resident Card ("Green Card") using Form I-90 (Application to Replace Permanent Resident Card): expired or expiring, lost/stolen/destroyed, never received, mutilated, incorrect due to USCIS error, or after a legal name/biographic change. Distinct from us/uscis/naturalization-n400, which addresses citizenship eligibility, not card renewal for an existing permanent resident. It does not submit the application; the live U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the live Form I-90 PDF at uscis.gov (fetched directly, no access block). All 7 pages extracted as clean, legible text and transcribed field-by-field from that output. Not a time-versioned/edition form: a Green Card replacement is a one-time filing per triggering event (expiry, loss, name change, etc.), not filed 'for' a recurring period, so it is authored at the plain (non-edition) registry path per the GSP-0005 §2 coexistence test. The item-number sequence in Part 3 (height/weight, items 6-9) could not be unambiguously reconstructed from the extracted PDF text layout; see VERIFICATION.md. Status remains 'draft' pending independent field-by-field source review by a second reviewer.

fields.name: alienRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Alien Registration Number (A-Number)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Digits only (the form prefixes a printed "A-"); leave blank if none has been assigned.

fields.name: uscisOnlineAccountNumber
fields.label: USCIS Online Account Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: currentFamilyName
fields.label: Your full name — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The replacement card will be issued in this name.

fields.name: currentGivenName
fields.label: Your full name — given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: currentMiddleName
fields.label: Your full name — middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: nameLegallyChanged
fields.label: Has your name legally changed since the issuance of your Permanent Resident Card?
fields.description: If yes, give the name exactly as printed on the existing card (previousFamilyName/previousGivenName/previousMiddleName) and attach evidence of the legal name change. "N/A" applies if the previous card was never received.

fields.name: previousFamilyName
fields.label: Name as printed on your current Permanent Resident Card — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when nameLegallyChanged is 'yes'. Attach evidence of the legal name change with the application.

fields.name: previousGivenName
fields.label: Name as printed on your current Permanent Resident Card — given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when nameLegallyChanged is 'yes'.

fields.name: previousMiddleName
fields.label: Name as printed on your current Permanent Resident Card — middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: mailingAddressInCareOfName
fields.label: Mailing address — in care of name
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Mailing address — street number and name
fields.description: Address where USCIS will send correspondence and the replacement card.

fields.name: mailingAddressApt
fields.label: Mailing address — apartment/floor/suite
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Mailing address — city or town
fields.description: City component of the address.

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Mailing address — state
fields.description: Required for a U.S. mailing address; leave blank for a foreign address (use mailingAddressProvince instead).

fields.name: mailingAddressZipCode
fields.label: Mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required for a U.S. mailing address.

fields.name: mailingAddressProvince
fields.label: Mailing address — province
fields.description: For a foreign mailing address.

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Mailing address — postal code
fields.description: For a foreign mailing address.

fields.name: mailingAddressCountry
fields.label: Mailing address — country
fields.description: Country component of the mailing address.

fields.name: physicalAddressDiffersFromMailing
fields.label: Is your physical address different from your mailing address?
fields.description: If true, give the physicalAddress* fields. Not itself a numbered form item; inferred from the form's "provide this information only if different than mailing address" instruction.

fields.name: physicalAddressLine1
fields.label: Physical address — street number and name
fields.description: Required when physicalAddressDiffersFromMailing is true.

fields.name: physicalAddressApt
fields.label: Physical address — apartment/floor/suite
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: physicalAddressCity
fields.label: Physical address — city or town
fields.description: Required when physicalAddressDiffersFromMailing is true.

fields.name: physicalAddressState
fields.label: Physical address — state
fields.description: For a U.S. physical address.

fields.name: physicalAddressZipCode
fields.label: Physical address — ZIP code
fields.description: For a U.S. physical address.

fields.name: physicalAddressProvince
fields.label: Physical address — province
fields.description: For a foreign physical address.

fields.name: physicalAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Physical address — postal code
fields.description: For a foreign physical address.

fields.name: physicalAddressCountry
fields.label: Physical address — country
fields.description: Required when physicalAddressDiffersFromMailing is true.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: placeOfBirthCity
fields.label: City/town/village of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: mothersGivenName
fields.label: Mother's given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: fathersGivenName
fields.label: Father's given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: classOfAdmission
fields.label: Class of admission
fields.description: The immigration classification under which permanent residence was granted (e.g. "IR1", "CR1", "F2A").

fields.name: dateOfAdmission
fields.label: Date of admission
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. The date permanent resident status was granted or admission occurred.

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: U.S. Social Security Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: permanentResidentStatus
fields.label: Your status is
fields.description: Lawful permanent resident and permanent resident (commuter status) both proceed to Section A reasons (reasonForApplicationSectionA); conditional permanent resident proceeds to Section B reasons (reasonForApplicationSectionB).

fields.name: reasonForApplicationSectionA
fields.label: Reason for application — Section A (lawful permanent resident or permanent resident in commuter status)
fields.description: Required when permanentResidentStatus is 'lawful_permanent_resident' or 'permanent_resident_commuter_status'. Select only one. When the reason is entering/leaving commuter status (the two 'h' options), also give portOfEntry.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-90 Part 2, Section A, items 2.a-2.j

fields.name: reasonForApplicationSectionB
fields.label: Reason for application — Section B (conditional permanent resident)
fields.description: Required when permanentResidentStatus is 'conditional_permanent_resident'. Select only one. Do not file if conditional status expires within the next 90 days.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-90 Part 2, Section B, items 3.a-3.e

fields.name: portOfEntry
fields.label: Port-of-Entry (POE) into the United States (city or town and state)
fields.description: Required when reasonForApplicationSectionA is 'taking_up_commuter_status'.

fields.name: locationAppliedForImmigrantVisaOrAdjustment
fields.label: Location where you applied for an immigrant visa or adjustment of status
fields.description: City/town and state, or foreign post.

fields.name: locationVisaIssuedOrAdjustmentGranted
fields.label: Location where your immigrant visa was issued, or USCIS office where you were granted adjustment of status
fields.description: City/town and state, foreign post, or USCIS field office name.

fields.name: enteredWithImmigrantVisa
fields.label: Did you enter the United States with an immigrant visa?
fields.description: If true, give destinationAtAdmission and portOfEntryAtAdmission. If false (i.e. status was via adjustment of status), those are not applicable. Inferred from the form's routing instruction rather than a separately numbered yes/no item.

fields.name: destinationAtAdmission
fields.label: Destination in the United States at time of admission (city or town and state)
fields.description: Required when enteredWithImmigrantVisa is true.

fields.name: portOfEntryAtAdmission
fields.label: Port-of-Entry where admitted to the United States
fields.description: Required when enteredWithImmigrantVisa is true.

fields.name: everInRemovalProceedings
fields.label: Have you ever been in exclusion, deportation, or removal proceedings or ordered removed from the United States?
fields.description: If true, provide a detailed explanation using additionalInformationEntries.

fields.name: everFiledI407OrAbandonedStatus
fields.label: Since you were granted permanent residence, have you ever filed Form I-407 (Abandonment by Alien of Status as Lawful Permanent Resident) or otherwise been determined to have abandoned your status?
fields.description: If true, provide a detailed explanation using additionalInformationEntries.

fields.name: heightFeet
fields.label: Height — feet
fields.description: The extracted PDF text interleaves the Height/Weight item numbers (6-9) with the surrounding Section B reason checkboxes, so the exact item-number-to-field mapping is not fully unambiguous from text extraction alone; see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: heightInches
fields.label: Height — inches
fields.description: See heightFeet for the item-number caveat.

fields.name: weightPounds
fields.label: Weight — pounds
fields.description: See heightFeet for the item-number caveat.

fields.name: ethnicity
fields.label: Ethnicity
fields.description: Select only one box.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-90 Part 3, item 10 preamble (Biographic Information)

fields.name: race
fields.label: Race
fields.description: Select all applicable boxes. Modeled as a comma-separated list of: american_indian_or_alaska_native, asian, black_or_african_american, native_hawaiian_or_other_pacific_islander, white.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-90 Part 3, item 10 preamble (Biographic Information)

fields.name: eyeColor
fields.label: Eye color
fields.description: Select only one box.

fields.name: hairColor
fields.label: Hair color
fields.description: Select only one box.

fields.name: requestingDisabilityAccommodation
fields.label: Are you requesting an accommodation because of your disabilities and/or impairments?
fields.description: If true, select at least one of deafOrHardOfHearingAccommodation, blindOrLowVisionAccommodation, or otherDisabilityAccommodation.

fields.name: deafOrHardOfHearingAccommodation
fields.label: I am deaf or hard of hearing and request the following accommodation
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. E.g. a requested sign-language interpreter and which language.

fields.name: blindOrLowVisionAccommodation
fields.label: I am blind or have low vision and request the following accommodation
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: otherDisabilityAccommodation
fields.label: I have another type of disability and/or impairment — describe the nature and the accommodation you are requesting
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: applicantCanReadEnglish
fields.label: I can read and understand English, and I have read and understand every question and instruction on this application and my answer to every question
fields.description: Select the box for either this or usedInterpreter (mutually exclusive). If neither applies literally, the form still requires selecting one.

fields.name: usedInterpreter
fields.label: The interpreter named in Part 6 read to me every question and instruction on this application, and my answer to every question, in a language in which I am fluent
fields.description: Mutually exclusive with applicantCanReadEnglish. If true, complete the interpreter* fields and give interpreterLanguage.

fields.name: interpreterLanguage
fields.label: Language in which the interpreter is fluent and communicated with the applicant
fields.description: Required when usedInterpreter is true.

fields.name: usedPreparer
fields.label: At my request, the preparer named in Part 7 prepared this application for me based only upon information I provided or authorized
fields.description: If true, complete the preparer* fields.

fields.name: applicantDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's daytime telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's mobile telephone number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantEmail
fields.label: Applicant's email address (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: applicantSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of applicant's signature
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. By signing, the applicant certifies under penalty of perjury that all information provided is complete, true, and correct, and acknowledges the required biometrics appointment.

fields.name: interpreterFamilyName
fields.label: Interpreter's family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedInterpreter is true.

fields.name: interpreterGivenName
fields.label: Interpreter's given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedInterpreter is true.

fields.name: interpreterBusinessOrOrganizationName
fields.label: Interpreter's business or organization name (if any)
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: interpreterDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Interpreter's daytime telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedInterpreter is true. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: interpreterEmail
fields.label: Interpreter's email address (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: interpreterSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of interpreter's signature
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Required when usedInterpreter is true.

fields.name: preparerFamilyName
fields.label: Preparer's family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedPreparer is true.

fields.name: preparerGivenName
fields.label: Preparer's given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedPreparer is true.

fields.name: preparerBusinessOrOrganizationName
fields.label: Preparer's business or organization name (if any)
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: preparerDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Preparer's daytime telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedPreparer is true. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: preparerEmail
fields.label: Preparer's email address (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: preparerIsAttorneyOrAccreditedRepresentative
fields.label: Is the preparer an attorney or accredited representative?
fields.description: Required when usedPreparer is true. If true, also give preparerRepresentationExtendsBeyondPreparation; if the representation extends beyond preparing this application, Form G-28 may also be required (out of scope here).

fields.name: preparerRepresentationExtendsBeyondPreparation
fields.label: Does the preparer's representation of the applicant extend beyond preparation of this application?
fields.description: Required when preparerIsAttorneyOrAccreditedRepresentative is true.

fields.name: preparerSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of preparer's signature
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Required when usedPreparer is true.

steps.title: Accommodations for individuals with disabilities and/or impairments
Applicant's statement, contact information, certification, and signature
Interpreter's contact information, certification, and signature
Preparer's contact information, declaration, and signature
